subject: Re: sleepless obviously
body:
Hard choice - but I feel good about it being the right one  ~  ~  :  DOCTOR 
KEITH BRIDWELL   in 
St. Louis , Missouri -   at Barnes Jewish  Hospital - part of Washington 
Univ. Medical School.  Highly recommended  by someone who had similar surgery.   
GOOGLE  - him - { part  oh my "CLINTON"  attraction - Premature silvery hair 
like my pain doctor  here Dr Dalton &  JEE ! }
thanks -   What do you think ?...     
Marcia M.

subject: Re: sleepless obviously
body:
i'm glad you made the choice.. where is the surgery being done?


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, April 2, 2008 4:25:30 AM
Subject: sleepless obviously


Jeffrey ,  Know you must have isuues tho i know little about you lately.  Why ?  U  OK ?
As for me  ~  being you asked , I am doing the surgery on April 24th -  checking in Apr. 20th .   ALso going this Sat. April 7th  (WASHINGTON uNIV Medical)
- to St Louis  for Monday review with Dr. Bridwell -  . Very scared but nearly happy -  hard to explain.   Distance from home and the travel my additional fear now . It's not easy.
Also very - MOST - anxious of the return AFTER surgery which will entail rods and screws,etc.
Maybe will be stronger than ever but hard to believe I won't hurt a lot.
Will you please write back with advice or suggestion ? (this is between you and me )
 Marcia Mae  (anyway , in some weird way, miss hearing from you-brotherly ?)
